chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-1083 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 12-10-2017. Mr. Kashir Ali Lakho, Advocate for petitioner alongwith the petitioner. Mr. Ismial Bhutto, Additional A.G alongwith DSP Abdullah Lakher Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, Additional P.G. = This petitioner who is complainant of Sessions Case No.144 of 2010 pending before 1st Addl: Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazeerabad has filed this petition for constituting a special team for arresting the proclaimed offenders. DSP Abdullah Lakher is present has informed that one of the accused namely Yar Ali has been arrested. He has further informed that remaining three accused were on bail before the trial court but subsequently they jumped off the bail, the trial court has already initiated due process against the said absconding accused and they are trying to arrest them. This position has not been denied by the petitioner’s counsel. We are of the view that when the trial is pending in a court of law and the trial court is already seized with the case of absconders and pursuing the matter in accordance with law, this petition would not be maintainable for such a relief. We have also seen the remaining prayers, the petitioner is seeking protection from the harassment allegedly caused to him by DSP Sher Ali Jamali whose son is one of the accused. We in the circumstances, direct SSP District Shaheed Benazeerabad to ensure that no harassment is caused to petitioner by the said police officer. This petition is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Fahad Memon
